title: carpesium linearibracteatum
intro: Carpesium linearibracteatum, also known as the linear-bracted hawk's beard, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carpesium linearibracteatum include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, with some herbal preparations also including it as an ingredient in topical creams and ointments.
